creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: brooks
Date: Tue Mar  4 23:04:41 2014
New Revision: 347084
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347084
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347084/

Log:
  Replace %%DATADIR%% in patched scan-build.
  
  PR:		ports/187193, ports/187243
  Submitted by:	Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu@FreeBSD.org>

Modified:
  head/lang/clang32/Makefile
  head/lang/clang33/Makefile
  head/lang/clang34/Makefile

Modified: head/lang/clang32/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/clang32/Makefile	Tue Mar  4 23:00:19 2014	(r347083)
+++ head/lang/clang32/Makefile	Tue Mar  4 23:04:41 2014	(r347084)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	clang
 DISTVERSION=	3.2
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTREVISION=	3
 CATEGORIES=	lang devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://llvm.org/releases/${PORTVERSION}/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	${LLVM_SUFFIX}
@@ -102,6 +102,8 @@ post-patch:
 	    ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.config.in
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/local/|${LOCALBASE}/|g' \
 	    ${WRKSRC}/tools/clang/lib/Frontend/InitHeaderSearch.cpp
+	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|%%DATADIR%%|${DATADIR}/|g' \
+	    ${WRKSRC}/tools/clang/tools/scan-build/scan-build
 
 pre-build:
 	${LN} -sf ${LLVM_PREFIX}/include/llvm/Intrinsics.gen \

Modified: head/lang/clang33/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/clang33/Makefile	Tue Mar  4 23:00:19 2014	(r347083)
+++ head/lang/clang33/Makefile	Tue Mar  4 23:04:41 2014	(r347084)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	clang
 DISTVERSION=	3.3
-PORTREVISION=	5
+PORTREVISION=	6
 CATEGORIES=	lang devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://llvm.org/releases/${PORTVERSION}/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	${LLVM_SUFFIX}
@@ -103,6 +103,8 @@ post-patch:
 	    ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.config.in
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/local/|${LOCALBASE}/|g' \
 	    ${WRKSRC}/tools/clang/lib/Frontend/InitHeaderSearch.cpp
+	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|%%DATADIR%%|${DATADIR}/|g' \
+	    ${WRKSRC}/tools/clang/tools/scan-build/scan-build
 
 pre-build:
 	${LN} -sf ${LLVM_PREFIX}/include/llvm/IR/Intrinsics.gen \

Modified: head/lang/clang34/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/clang34/Makefile	Tue Mar  4 23:00:19 2014	(r347083)
+++ head/lang/clang34/Makefile	Tue Mar  4 23:04:41 2014	(r347084)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	clang
 DISTVERSION=	3.4
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	lang devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://llvm.org/releases/${PORTVERSION}/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	${LLVM_SUFFIX}
@@ -109,6 +109,8 @@ post-patch:
 	    ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.config.in
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/local/|${LOCALBASE}/|g' \
 	    ${WRKSRC}/tools/clang/lib/Frontend/InitHeaderSearch.cpp
+	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|%%DATADIR%%|${DATADIR}/|g' \
+	    ${WRKSRC}/tools/clang/tools/scan-build/scan-build
 
 pre-build:
 	${LN} -sf ${LLVM_PREFIX}/include/llvm/IR/Intrinsics.gen \
